small.name: Typical Assisted Living Community
small.notes: 40-unit single-story; dining room; activity room; shared bathing; nurse station

medium.name: Watermark at Brooklyn Heights
medium.notes: 4 stories; 283 units; memory care wing; full commercial kitchen; spa; theater; rooftop garden

large.name: Vi at the Glen
large.notes: CCRC campus; 318 IL units; 60 AL units; 39 memory care; skilled nursing; wellness center; multiple dining venues

space_library.name: Resident Suite (Typical AL)
notes: Studio/1BR with kitchenette, accessible bathroom, emergency call system; min 100 SF per state codes

space_library.name: Memory Care Resident Room
notes: Simpler layout; no kitchenette; wander-guard system; inboard bathroom

space_library.name: Resident Corridor
notes: 5 ft min width; handrails both sides; wander loops for memory care; way-finding

space_library.name: Main Dining Room
notes: Residential character; flexible seating; 2-3 seatings per meal typical; 18-22 SF/seat

space_library.name: Commercial Kitchen
notes: 3 meals/day + snacks; dietary restrictions; tray service for memory care

space_library.name: Activity / Multi-Purpose Room
notes: Exercise classes; crafts; movies; divisible partitions; 15 SF/person

space_library.name: Wellness / Clinic Room
notes: Physician visits; medication management; vitals station; med storage with narcotics lock

space_library.name: Medication Station / Nurse Station
notes: Narcotics safe; medication cart parking; emergency supplies; centrally located on each floor

space_library.name: Spa Bathing / Assisted Bathing
notes: Roll-in tub; ceiling lift; warm surfaces; privacy; 1 per 15-20 residents

space_library.name: Laundry (Central + Resident)
notes: Commercial washers/dryers; soiled/clean separation; resident laundry room separate

space_library.name: Living Room / Lounge
notes: Residential character; fireplace common; library corner; multiple small lounges preferred

space_library.name: Secure Courtyard / Garden
notes: Enclosed for memory care; walking paths; raised garden beds; shade structures; emergency egress

plan_archetypes.notes: Double-loaded for resident wings; courtyard for memory care
